song.title: Cornerstone
song.lyrics:
[V1] My hope is built on nothing less Than Jesus' blood and righteousness I dare not trust the sweetest frame But wholly trust in Jesus' name
[C] Christ alone, Cornerstone Weak made strong in the Savior's love Through the storm He is Lord Lord of all
[V2] When darkness seems to hide His face I rest on His unchanging grace In every high and stormy gale My anchor holds within the veil My anchor holds within the veil
[B] He is Lord Lord of all
[V3] When He shall come with trumpet sound Oh may I then in Him be found Dressed in His righteousness alone Faultless to stand before the throne
